item.title: First_post
item.author: Author
item.description: Hi this is the first post of mine. From now on, my personal working and studying process will be posted here.

item.author: Author
item.description: @Configuration 组件添加 源码重点： postProcessBeanDefinitionRegistry 每个registryId唯一 调用processConfigBeanDefinitions将registry中Bean进
